tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
move 2 before 1
move 3 before 2
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # move 2 before 1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # move 3 before 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 3
        set name "Deny_Ubuntu_All_Else"
        set uuid fe64ec6e-2934-51f1-c522-056d04baa9bc
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuHostGrp"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set comments "Deny all other outbound traffic from the compromised Ubuntu host."
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_Web_Only"
        set uuid fe50d49a-2934-51f1-39a0-6dceb31d3060
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuHostGrp"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set logtraffic all
        set nat enable
        set comments "Permit only web traffic needed by the agent; reduce arbitrary HTTPS exfiltration."
    next
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
